mapper.sql: SELECT o.order_id, o.order_no, o.order_type, o.supplier_id, s.supplier_name, o.warehouse_id, w.warehouse_name, o.status, o.inbound_date, o.complete_date, o.total_qty, o.total_amount, o.del_flag, o.create_by, o.create_time, o.update_by, o.update_time, o.remark FROM wms_inbound_order o LEFT JOIN wms_supplier s ON o.supplier_id = s.supplier_id LEFT JOIN wms_warehouse w ON o.warehouse_id = w.warehouse_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wms_inbound_order (order_no, order_type, supplier_id, warehouse_id, status, inbound_date, total_qty, total_amount, create_by, create_time, remark) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{orderType}, #{supplierId}, #{warehouseId}, #{status}, #{inboundDate}, #{totalQty}, #{totalAmount}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.delete: UPDATE wms_inbound_order SET del_flag = '2' WHERE order_id IN #{orderId}
mapper.select: SELECT d.detail_id, d.order_id, d.material_id, m.material_code, m.material_name, m.spec_model, m.unit, d.plan_qty, d.received_qty, d.putaway_qty, d.batch_no, d.production_date, d.expiry_date, d.location_id, l.warehouse_code as location_code, d.unit_price, d.del_flag, d.create_by, d.create_time, d.update_by, d.update_time, d.remark FROM wms_inbound_order_detail d LEFT JOIN wms_material m ON d.material_id = m.material_id LEFT JOIN wms_warehouse l ON d.location_id = l.warehouse_id WHERE d.order_id = #{orderId} AND d.del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wms_inbound_order_detail (order_id, material_id, plan_qty, received_qty, putaway_qty, batch_no, production_date, expiry_date, location_id, unit_price, create_by, create_time, remark) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{materialId}, #{planQty}, #{receivedQty}, #{putawayQty}, #{batchNo}, #{productionDate}, #{expiryDate}, #{locationId}, #{unitPrice}, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.delete: UPDATE wms_inbound_order_detail SET del_flag = '2' WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
